reviews.comment:
Muy poco personal para atencion. Tarde 45 minutos para cargar nafta. A los dueños les diria que si no pueden poner mas personal por que no les da el negocio dedíquense a otra cosa.

(Translated by Google)
Very few staff to serve. It took me 45 minutes to fill up with gas. I'd tell the owners that if they can't hire more staff because they're not making enough money, they should do something else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRdFBmS19BRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención muy Buena! Siempre hay gente así que paciencia! Tenes para mirar tele, leer el diario, tomar algo, distenderse o trabajar. No es uno de esos locales de café pero no se queda atrás en comodidades.

(Translated by Google)
The service is excellent! It's always busy, so be patient! You can watch TV, read the newspaper, have a drink, relax, or work. It's not one of those typical coffee shops, but it's certainly comfortable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbmFpekRBEAE
